parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in a physical kitchen environment. Lighting, movements, and interactions with physical objects like the coffee maker and stove are natural and consistent with live-action recording.

characters.appearance: Black male, around 30 years old, bald with a full, well-groomed black beard. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Loose-fitting, solid grey short-sleeve t-shirt. A small black lavalier microphone is clipped to the neckline.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, casual, and engaged in his task while casually practicing a language.

scenes.setting: Kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, light fixture.

panels.panel_visual_description: A bald Black man with a full beard stands in a kitchen. He wears a loose grey t-shirt with a lavalier microphone clipped to the collar. He holds a small metal filter basket in his left hand and uses a plastic scoop in his right hand to transfer coffee grounds from a clear plastic container into the filter. The kitchen features white cabinets and a light fixture above him.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a man in a kitchen preparing coffee. He is scooping coffee grounds into a filter basket. A text overlay is positioned at the top center of the screen.
scenes.on_screen_text: pov: you become bilingual with THIS app

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up, top-down view of a white kitchen counter. A person's hands are visible, screwing the top half of a metal Moka pot onto its base. To the right of the Moka pot, a smartphone lies flat on the counter, screen facing up. A clear plastic container filled with coffee grounds is partially visible in the upper right background.

scenes.visual_description: The camera focuses closely on the man's hands as he assembles a Moka pot on the counter. A smartphone is lying next to it, displaying an app interface. The text overlay remains at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Perfecto. Entonces, un café caramelo y unos pastelitos, ¿verdad? [Perfect. So, a caramel coffee and some pastries, right?]
scenes.on_screen_text: pov: you become bilingual with THIS app

panels.panel_visual_description: The bald Black man with a beard stands in the kitchen, holding his smartphone in his left hand. He looks slightly off-camera to the left, smiling, and gestures with his right hand as he speaks. He wears the same grey t-shirt with the lavalier microphone. In the background, a dining table, chairs, and a trash can are visible.

scenes.visual_description: The man is shown from the chest up, holding his phone and speaking. He looks relaxed and conversational. The text overlay is still present at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Mmm, eso suena como una buena idea, pero no tengo pastelitos ahora mismo. [Mmm, that sounds like a good idea, but I don't have pastries right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: pov: you become bilingual with THIS app

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a stainless steel kitchen stove. A person's right hand reaches into the frame and turns the middle knob to ignite the burner. The assembled metal Moka pot is visible sitting on the burner in the background.

scenes.visual_description: The camera focuses on the stove knobs as the man's hand turns one to ignite the burner under the Moka pot. The text overlay remains at the top.
scenes.on_screen_text: pov: you become bilingual with THIS app
